home.seoDescription: Welcome to the portfolio and blog of Paweł Wielga - .NET Developer & Software Engineer.

hero.subtitle: Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience in .NET technologies. Specialized in desktop, web, and mobile applications for industrial environments, banking, and consumer solutions.
hero.underConstruction: Under construction - some content is just a placeholder.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: .NET Developer
about.paragraph1: I am a .NET Developer with over 8 years of experience designing and building desktop, web, and mobile applications. I have worked on complex systems for industry, banking, the public sector, and consumer applications.
about.paragraph2: In my work, I put strong emphasis on code quality, clear architecture, and application performance. I enjoy analyzing existing systems, organizing code, simplifying solutions, and refactoring them so they are easier to maintain and develop further.
about.paragraph3: I developed my experience at Zortrax S.A., where I created software for the 3D printing industry, including the Z-SUITE and Zortrax inCloud platforms. Later, in cooperation with 7N, I delivered projects for mBank. That stage ended in June 2025. Since July 2025 I have been working at APN Promise, developing software offered by the company and co-creating solutions for the public sector.
about.seoDescription: About Paweł Wielga - experienced .NET Developer working on desktop, web and mobile applications.
